targets.expr:
last_over_time(
    {rebirth_run="1"} |= "INFO Detected day"
    | regexp `INFO Detected day (?P<currentday>\d+),`
    | unwrap currentday
    [$__range]
)

last_over_time(
    {rebirth_run="1"} |= "BloodMoon SetDay"
    | regexp `BloodMoon SetDay: day (?P<ingameday>\d+),`
    | unwrap ingameday
    [$__range]
)

max(
    last_over_time (
        {rebirth_run="1"} |= "INFO Detected day"
        | regexp `INFO Detected day (?P<currentday>\d+),`
        | label_format metric="currentday"
        | unwrap currentday
        [$__range]
    )
) by (metric)

max(
    last_over_time (
        {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "INF BloodMoon SetDay"
        | regexp `INF BloodMoon SetDay: day (?P<currentday>\d+), last day (?P<lastday>\d+), freq (?P<freq>\d+), range`
        | label_format metric="freq"
        | unwrap freq
        [$__range]
    )
) by (metric)

max(
    last_over_time (
        {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "INF BloodMoon SetDay"
        | regexp `INF BloodMoon SetDay: day (?P<currentday>\d+), last day (?P<lastday>\d+), freq (?P<freq>\d+), range`
        | label_format metric="lastday"
        | unwrap lastday
        [$__range]
    )
) by (metric)

count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "BloodMoon starting for day"
    [$__range]
  )

count_over_time(
    {rebirth_run="1"} |= "resetting day"
    [$__range]
)

last_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "gameStage"
  | regexp `Player id (?P<playerID>\d+), gameStage (?P<GameStage>\d+)`
  | label_format playerID="{{.playerID}}"
  | unwrap GameStage
  [$__range]
) by (playerID)

sum by(player)(
  count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "joined the game"
    | regexp `Player '(?P<player>[^']+)' joined`
    [$__range]
  )
)

sum by(player)(
    sum_over_time(
        {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "disconnected after"
        | regexp `Player (?P<player>\S+) disconnected after (?P<minutes>[0-9.]+) minutes`
        | unwrap minutes
        [$__range]
    )
  )

sum by(player)(
  count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "died"
    | regexp `Player '(?P<player>[^']+)' died`
    | player != ""
    [$__range]
  )
)

sum by(player)(
  count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "killed by"
    | regexp `Entity (?P<victim>.+) (?P<victimID>\d+) killed by (?P<player>.+) (?P<playerID>\d+)`
    | player=~"^(Dude|haas2|Lost|Galiwyr|Bright|WhichWitch)$" 
    [$__range]
  )
)

count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "killed by"
    | regexp `Entity (?P<victim>.+) (?P<victimID>\d+) killed by (?P<killer>.+) (?P<killerID>\d+)`
    | killer=~"^(Dude|haas2|Lost|Galiwyr|Bright|WhichWitch)$" | keep victim,killer
    [$__range]
  )

sum by(player)(
  count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "killed by"
    | regexp `Entity (?P<victim>.+) (?P<victimID>\d+) killed by (?P<player>.+) (?P<playerID>\d+)`
    [$__range]
  )
)

panels.title: Kills by any player, dog or zombie

targets.expr:
sum by(player)(
  count_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "died" 
    | regexp `Player '(?P<player>[^']+)' died`
    | player != ""
    [$__range]
  )
)

max by(playerid) (
  last_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |= "gameStage"
    | regexp `Player id (?P<playerid>\d+), gameStage (?P<gamestage>\d+)`
    | unwrap gamestage
    [$__interval]
  )
)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `Ply: (?P<Ply>\d+) Zom: \d+ Ent: \d+ `
  | label_format metric="Ply"
  | unwrap Ply
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
    | regexp `Ply: \d+ Zom: (?P<Zom>\d+) Ent: \d+ `
    | label_format metric="Zom"
    | unwrap Zom
    [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
    | regexp `Ply: \d+ Zom: \d+ Ent: (?P<Ent>\d+) `
    | label_format metric="Ent"
    | unwrap Ent
    [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
    {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
    | regexp ` CO: (?P<CO>\d+) `
    | label_format metric="CO"
    | unwrap CO
    [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `Heap: (?P<heap>[\d\.]+)MB`
  | label_format metric="heap"
  | unwrap heap
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `Max: (?P<max>[\d\.]+)MB`
  | label_format metric="Max"
  | unwrap max
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `RSS: (?P<rss>[\d\.]+)MB`
  | label_format metric="RSS"
  | unwrap rss
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `Chunks: (?P<Chunks>[\d\.]+) `
  | label_format metric="Chunks"
  | unwrap Chunks
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)

max_over_time(
  {job="7d2d",rebirth_run="1"} |~ "INF Time: .*"
  | regexp `INF Time: (?P<gametime>\d+\.\d\d)m `
  | label_format metric="gametime"
  | unwrap gametime
  [$__interval]
) by (metric)
